reviews.comment:
En nuestro viaje desde Trelew a Esquel, fue la única estación de servicio con combustible antes de llegar a Tecka. El ACA todo muy cuidado y limpio, la atención del personal fue excelente.

(Translated by Google)
On our trip from Trelew to Esquel, it was the only gas station with fuel before reaching Tecka. The ACA was very well maintained and clean, and the staff was excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbVA2NFN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Las torta fritas imperdibles. Un clásico.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The fried cakes are a must-try. A classic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtaF9hSVJREAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, media hora para atenernos, por un auto que no adelantaba porque no podía pagar porque no les andaba el sistema para pagar con tarjetas, no me hicieron factura A. Pleno fin de semana largo, para arrancarlo alunada

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, it took half an hour to get through, and my car wouldn't move because I couldn't pay since their card payment system was down. They didn't even give me an invoice. It was a long weekend, and I was in a terrible mood to start it off.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtcTRxZzRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Instalaciones impecables, excelente atención y los precios del servicompras totalmente coherentes!

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable facilities, excellent service, and completely consistent service prices!

reviews.comment:
Para nosotros excelente!!!...buena predisposicion los empleados!!!...hicimos noche ahí!!!...y enfrente el comedor de Emanuel,el mejor pan casero y pizzas que ge comido!!!...

(Translated by Google)
For us, it was excellent!!!...the staff were very helpful!!!...we even stayed overnight!!!...and across the street is Emanuel's restaurant, the best homemade bread and pizzas I've ever had!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtaWZXWWRBEAE

Great service!

reviews.comment:
Los sandwiches de pan casero con manteca,jamón y queso lo mejor!! También la buena atención,si el lugar fuera más amplió y con más personal estaría perfecto,ya que es chico y hay mucha concurrencia y por ende demora en la atención

(Translated by Google)
The homemade bread sandwiches with butter, ham, and cheese are the best! The service is also excellent. If the place were bigger and had more staff, it would be perfect. It's small and crowded, which means it takes a long time to serve.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMteXFuWjJnRRAB
